data.name: Idempotent Consumer
data.xml_template:
<route id="{{source}}">
    <from uri="direct:{{source}}"/>


    <!-- Solo primera vez para esa key -->
    <idempotentConsumer idempotentRepository="idempotentRepo">
        <simple>{{expression}}</simple>
        {{generateDestination handles.[0].to}}
    </idempotentConsumer>

    {{generateDestination handles.[1].to}}
</route>
